name: 250 MG Levofloxacin Tablets IP
about: 250 MG Levofloxacin Tablets IP is a solid dosage form of general medicine manufactured in India. These tablets are used to treat bacterial infections such as pneumonia, bronchitis, urinary tract infections, and skin infections. Levofloxacin is a type of antibiotic that works by stopping the growth of bacteria. The recommended dosage for this medicine is 250 MG. It is advised to store the tablets in a dry place to maintain their effectiveness.
